method.operational_definition: Distance from femoral head center to intercondylar notch center.
Distance from medial intercondylar eminence to medial malleolus tip.
Distance from humeral head to trochlea center.
Distance from radial head to radial styloid tip.
Distance from olecranon tip to ulnar styloid tip.
Angle between femur long axis and tibia long axis in sagittal plane; full extension = 0°, maximum flexion ~140°.
Sagittal plane angle between pelvis and femur; 0° = anatomical position.
Sagittal plane elevation of humerus; 0° = arm at side.
Angle between humerus and radius/ulna; full extension = 0°.
Dorsiflexion angle between tibia and foot dorsum.

measurement_definitions.name: Cervical spine flexion range of motion

method.operational_definition: Angle between Frankfort plane and horizontal; measured from neutral.
Maximum diameter of femoral head sphere.
Minimum tibiofemoral joint space width on AP X-ray, medial compartment.
Angle between femoral neck axis and femoral shaft axis in frontal plane.
Angle between tibial plateau and tibial shaft axis in sagittal plane.
Angle between ASIS-patella line and patella-tibial tuberosity line.
Angle between femoral neck axis and transcondylar axis in transverse plane.
Angle between tibial plateau transverse axis and transmalleolar axis in transverse plane.
